name: Engineering Dashboard with Git Commits v4

nodes.name: Build Slides Requests
nodes.notes: Builds the full Google Slides API batchUpdate payload. No file system access needed — works on n8n Cloud.

nodes.name: Create Presentation
nodes.notes: Creates a blank Google Slides presentation. Returns the presentationId used by the next node.

nodes.name: Apply Slides Content
nodes.notes: Sends all 6 slides worth of shapes, text, and colours in one batchUpdate call.

nodes.name: Slack — Post Dashboard
nodes.notes: Posts rich Slack message with all KPIs + a button linking directly to the Google Slides deck. Also includes a Download as PPTX link — Google auto-converts Slides to PPTX on export.

options.jql: project = CSI AND issuetype IN ("New Feature", Enhancement) AND status NOT IN (Cancelled, Duplicate, Closed, "Customer Validation", "Waiting for customer") AND "team[team]" IN (d826d1d2-2b59-4b4c-99b1-1140211e8865, 93c753a8-f92d-453f-90f8-695d6ed9e9de,c38939ff-71a5-41cf-b599-6f8e7adde327) AND priority IN (Critical, High) ORDER BY created DESC
project = CSI AND type IN (Bug, Support) AND status NOT IN (Duplicate, "Do not use", "Waiting for customer", Closed, "Customer Validation", "On Hold", Pending, Cancelled) ORDER BY created DESC
project = CSI AND issuetype IN (Bug, Support) AND "Team[Team]" !=ba041cda-e806-4b14-9ee4-98d1187e5e8d AND status CHANGED TO ("Customer Validation", Closed) AFTER -7d ORDER BY created DESC

nodes.name: Fetch GitHub Commits
nodes.notes: Calls GitHub Search Commits API for all commits in last 7 days where message contains 'CSI-'. Runs on the same schedule as the dashboard. Requires a GitHub PAT stored as HTTP Header Auth credential with header 'Authorization' = 'Bearer YOUR_PAT'. Replace YOUR_ORG/YOUR_REPO with your actual repo.

nodes.name: Process GitHub Commits
nodes.notes: Parses GitHub Search API response. Produces: commitsByTicket (most recent commit per CSI ticket) + allCommits7d (all commits last 7d) + devCommitSummary.

nodes.name: Fetch GitHub Commits (SPROUT)
nodes.notes: Calls GitHub Search Commits API for all commits in last 7 days where message contains 'CSI-'. Runs on the same schedule as the dashboard. Requires a GitHub PAT stored as HTTP Header Auth credential with header 'Authorization' = 'Bearer YOUR_PAT'. Replace YOUR_ORG/YOUR_REPO with your actual repo.
